title: dombeya acutangula
intro: Dombeya acutangula, also known as the Pink Satin or Copper Pod tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sterculiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dombeya acutangula include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
